title: Rohit-Satyam/RNAgrinder: v1.0.1
author: Rohit Satyam
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This is the second stable release of RNAgrinder. 
 Changes made: 
 
 Added module to perform RNA read classification using Kraken2 
 Added feature to skip various preprocessing step including Ribosomal Detection and Kraken2. 
 Improved the help section. 
 
 For older release visit  here
steps_raw:
